positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, glowing fireflies illuminating the paths. Central composition with a trio of woodland animals (a friendly fox, a rabbit, and an owl) looking curiously at the viewer. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Cottagecore illustration, highly detailed linework, deep jewel tones contrasted with glowing cyan and emerald accents. Composition must be balanced and symmetrical, suitable for repeating textile patterns. Lighting: Soft, magical subsurface scattering, evoking deep night without being dark. Crisp vector aesthetics with painterly texture, clean edges, high contrast silhouettes, perfect for apparel printing. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, grain, text, logo, watermark, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, photorealism, scary, messy
